creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150573
introduce devel/qscintilla2 in LIB_DEPENDS

Thanks to riggs@ for pointing out, that there is a missing dependency, only noticeable, if all OPTIONS are disabled. The updated patch should respect this.

- new LIB_DEPENDS devel/qscintilly2
- while here, sorting LIB_DEPENDS entries alphabetically
